editButton.title: Click to edit SEO information for this page
editButton.titleIgnored: This page has not been analyzed yet or is ignored from an SEO standpoint.
editButton.bodyIgnored: 4SEO may not have analyzed this page yet or it may have ignored it. Ignoring pages happens most of the time when they are restricted to logged-in users but also for pages that have no SEO value such as log-in page, some forms, etc
editButton.reloadPage: Please reload the page and re-open this dialog to see updated information.
